title: Statevector Debugging
description: Learn to inspect and debug quantum states using statevector simulation, including amplitude analysis, phase tracking, state verification, and identifying common state preparation errors.
learningObjectives: Inspect statevectors and extract amplitude/phase information
Compare actual vs expected quantum states using fidelity metrics
Track state evolution step-by-step through circuit execution
Diagnose common state preparation errors including phase and entanglement issues
Apply systematic debugging strategies for quantum state verification
